title: The Moment Whistleblower David Grusch Learned UFOs Are Real
summary: David Grusch describes how he came to believe in the reality of UFOs/UAP, explaining it was a gradual process involving military cases he couldn't explain, intelligence reports, being denied access to programs, and trusted high-level sources confirming information.

key_claims.claim: There were certain military cases being analyzed that could not be explained in a prosaic fashion
Intelligence reports were provided to Grusch regarding UAP-related information
When Grusch asked agencies for access to programs related to the intel reports, he was denied access repeatedly over a couple of years
Trusted high-level people confirmed a lot of the UAP-related information when asked directly
